title: Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
